subject: catch-up
body:
J. E. E    -    wondering where u are  since I haven't heard back from you.   
  Can u say   ??
Have you managed to set up your SONY  reader  ?      YOU might want the  
warrantee  plan   for  2 or 3 years.  Maybe  have to handle that now that it  is 
in your possession.
 
Marcia M.



**************************************See AOL's top rated recipes 
(http://food.aol.com/top-rated-recipes?NCID=aoltop00030000000004)
